name: chat_create
description: Generate conversational responses using Cohere's language models. Supports multi-turn dialogue, tool use, document grounding, citations, safety modes, and structured JSON output.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Chat message history with role and content objects in chronological order.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Available functions the model can invoke.

parameters.name: documents
parameters.description: Reference documents for grounded generation with citations.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Enforce JSON or text output structure.

parameters.name: safety_mode
parameters.description: Safety level: CONTEXTUAL, STRICT, or OFF.

parameters.name: stop_sequences
parameters.description: Up to 5 strings triggering generation halt.

messages.content: Explain the concept of RAG in AI.

content.text: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) is a technique that combines information retrieval with language generation...
